scenarios.name: Operation Barbarossa
scenarios.blurb: Three army groups cross the Bug and the Niemen at first light.

scenarios.name: Second Battle of El Alamein
scenarios.blurb: Forty miles of front that cannot be outflanked. Eighth Army goes through it.

scenarios.name: Operation Overlord
scenarios.blurb: Five divisions land, three drop in the dark, and the bocage waits inland.
